title: release-gate governance.yaml
description: Deployment governance policy for an AI agent, in the canonical format produced by `release-gate audit --emit-config` and consumed by `release-gate score`.

loop.description: Loop verification policy. Governs how Release Gate's /api/verify endpoint drives the Verify phase of an agent loop.

mode.description: permissive (default): a clean iteration with no policy SHIPs. strict: max_iterations, total_cost_limit, max_tokens_per_iteration, stop_condition and checker_model must all be declared or every iteration ROLLBACKs.

max_iterations.description: Hard cap on loop iterations. Exceeding this triggers ROLLBACK.

total_cost_limit.description: Hard cumulative $ ceiling for the entire loop run. Exceeding triggers ROLLBACK.

cost_per_iteration_limit.description: Soft $ ceiling per iteration. Exceeding warns but does not immediately roll back.

max_tokens_per_iteration.description: Token budget per iteration, applied to the trace validator.

maker_model.description: Model that generates outputs. Documented for audit purposes.

checker_model.description: Model used for verification. Must differ from maker_model to avoid self-review bias.

stop_condition.description: When to SHIP. Bare string ('always_ship', 'human_approval_required') or a typed object: {type: eval_pass_rate, min_pass_rate: 90}, {type: required_keyword_present|required_keyword_absent, keyword: '...'}, {type: artifact_exists, path: '...'}. Leave blank to let Release Gate decide from check results.

agent.description: Runtime profile of the agent, used by the Impact Simulator.

policy.description: Which checks block a release (fail_on) versus warn (warn_on). Check names are upper-snake-case.

fail_on.description: Checks that cause a BLOCK/FAIL decision when they fail

warn_on.description: Checks that cause a HOLD/WARN decision when they fail

checks.description: Per-check configuration. Each check has an `enabled` flag plus check-specific fields.

action_budget.description: OWASP LLM10 · NIST AI RMF MANAGE-2.2 · EU AI Act Art.9 — hard daily cost ceiling.

max_daily_cost.description: Hard daily $ ceiling on API spend

fallback_declared.description: NIST AI RMF MANAGE-4.1 · EU AI Act Art.14 · OWASP LLM08 — kill switch & on-call owner.

type.description: How the agent is disabled at runtime (e.g. feature-flag, env_var)

location.description: Path, env var, or URL of the kill switch

fallback_mode.description: What happens when the agent is disabled (e.g. escalate-to-human)

team_owner.description: Team or person who gets paged

identity_boundary.description: OWASP LLM01 · NIST AI RMF MANAGE-1.3 — auth, rate limiting, data isolation.

type.description: Auth method (e.g. oauth2, api_key, jwt, mtls)

input_contract.description: NIST AI RMF MEASURE-2.5 — declared input schema with valid/invalid samples.
